# Maersk fonts

This repo contains Maersk, Sealand & Safmarine fonts.

## Publishing package

Package has to be published into multiple private registries used within Maersk.
In order to that, you have to:

### 1. Create a new version of the package and push to git

Run in your terminal following command:

`npm run version:ci <semantic-version>`

where `<semantic-version>` can be:

- `patch`: version 0.0.1
- `minor`: version 0.1.0
- `major`: version 1.0.0

e.g. `npm run version:ci patch`

This command will bump package version number in package.json.
It will also add, commit and push release to GIT and tag commit with current version number.

### 2. Publish package to npm repositories

Go to GitHub, select tag and create release. Once release is created, the GitHub Action `Pipeline publish NPM packages` will kick off and take care of releasing packages to following NPM repositories:

- GitHub packages
- Nexus on Maersk DevNet
